method.attractor: strobe at drive period, warm-started march + bisection of the period-1 boundary (300–600 transient periods)
method.refinement: Floquet multiplier of the Newton period-1 orbit seeded from the attractor; onset interpolated at ρ = −1
method.corroboration: 0–1 test (Gottwald–Melbourne) on cosθ strobe series, 700 samples, seed 12345
method.literatureAnchor: Baker & Gollub: A_PD ≈ 1.0663 at γ = 0.5, ω = 2/3
